title: manus witherstorm [optimized]
description: this is the perfect modpack for the witherstorm
body: this is manus witherstorm modpack it has mods to optermise your experinence it adds things like dynamic lights shaders and more note : none of the mods that are included in this modpack are made by me look at the mod to find out the creators. also i chouldnt get fullbright textrue packs to work on here but i added a mod so if you press g you should get fullbright
